# nomad_acl_token (Data Source)

Get information on an ACL token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_acl_token" "my_token" {
  accessor_id = "aa534e09-6a07-0a45-2295-a7f77063d429"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `accessor_id` (String) Non-sensitive identifier for this token.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Date and time the token was created.
- `expiration_time` (String) The point after which a token is considered revoked and eligible for destruction.
- `expiration_ttl` (String) The expiration TTL for the token.
- `global` (Boolean) Whether the token is replicated to all regions, or if it will only be used in the region it was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Human-friendly name of the ACL token.
- `policies` (Set of String) List of policy names associated with this token.
- `roles` (Set of Object) The roles that are applied to the token. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))
- `secret_id` (String, Sensitive) The token value itself.
- `type` (String) The type of the token.

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
